github_repos.title: Fabric IQ
github_repos.context: FabricIQ is a comprehensive Microsoft reference implementation and hands-on workshop focused on building modern data analytics and AI solutions using Microsoft Fabric. Covers Data Engineering, Data Factory, Data Science, Lakehouse, Data Warehouse, Real-Time Intelligence, Power BI, and OneLake.

github_repos.title: Foundry IQ
github_repos.context: FoundryIQ is a Microsoft reference implementation for building enterprise AI applications using Azure AI Foundry. Covers AI agents, RAG, prompt orchestration, model deployment, AI evaluation, vector search, and embeddings.

github_repos.title: Work IQ
github_repos.context: WorkIQ is a Microsoft reference solution for automating enterprise business processes with AI agents. Covers workflow automation, Microsoft 365 integration, enterprise data access, and AI-powered business assistants.

github_repos.title: Fabric IQ, Foundry IQ & Work IQ
github_repos.context: End-to-end Microsoft enterprise AI reference implementation combining Microsoft Fabric, Azure AI Foundry, and intelligent business workflows. Covers data platforms, AI models, RAG, agent orchestration, governance, and enterprise deployment.
